header: Appendix AToolBench Standard Splits vs. RRB: Query Style Comparison

images.caption:
Figure 8:Side-by-side comparison of ToolBench standard evaluation split queries (G1/G2/G3) and
RRB queries for the same tools. ToolBench queries are verbose, story-wrapped, and
enumerate specific parameters. Whereas, RRB queries are short, intent-focused, and reflect how a real user
would naturally phrase a request.
